/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_f1u_cu_up_split_connector.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1u_cu_up_split_connector.dir/cu_up/split_connector/f1u_split_connector_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1u_cu_up_split_connector.dir/cu_up/split_connector/f1u_split_connector.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_f1u_cu_up_split_connector.a
